title: KeyboardEvent
description: Standard DOM event representing keyboard input, providing information about the key pressed, modifier states, and the target element.
imports: // Standard DOM event, no import required for usage in TypeScript/JavaScript.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Standard DOM KeyboardEvent type used by component handlers.

props.name: key
props.description: The value of the key pressed.

props.name: code
props.description: The physical key on the keyboard (layout-independent).

props.name: altKey
props.description: Whether the Alt key was pressed.

props.name: ctrlKey
props.description: Whether the Control key was pressed.

props.name: shiftKey
props.description: Whether the Shift key was pressed.

props.name: metaKey
props.description: Whether the Meta key (Command on Mac, Windows key on Windows) was pressed.

props.name: repeat
props.description: Whether the key is being held down for auto-repeat.
